creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
I've switched to intel drive, some things go better now, some still lead to a 
crash.
1) test #1: i'm running an Xorg with just an xterm and some winmanager 
(metacity), with no other background operations, e.g. under low load. Then 
run qtiplot and try to do a 3d plotting there. Regardless of whether dri is 
enabled on not:
  a) with i810 driver i've got a crash like the one described in the previous 
messages
  b) with intel driver it works without crashes

2) the same test, but with much KDE stuff loaded and firefox being built in 
the background (heavy load), DRI diabled:
  a) with i810 it crashes as in the previous test
  b) with intel I got a crash too, though it differ from i810:

   i) there was no specific messages in the log, just the one saying "Fatal 
server error:\nCaught signal 11.  Server aborting" (the full log in in the 
bottom) - also still can't detect where the coredump was put
  ii) I was unable to reset the console videomode via vidcontrol after that, 
so need to reboot

----------------
